---
title: "What's covered elsewhere"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show code"
---

{{< include _setup.qmd >}}
{{< include _pages-nav.qmd >}}

## What's covered elsewhere

The three principles above are elaborated in detail across the project:

- **Reproducibility:** Nix + rix workflows, lockfile discipline, package versioning (see `nix-rix-r-environment` skill and `default.nix` patterns)
- **Consistency:** Code style guides, linters, and pre-commit hooks (see `tidyverse-style`, `accessibility` rules, and `.claude/scripts/r_code_check.sh`)
- **Validation:** Test-driven development, quality gates, and analytical review checklists (see `test-driven-development`, `quality-gates` skills and `analytical-review-checklist` rule)
